2021-22 California Golden Bears Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 12-20 (5-15, 10th in Pac-12 MBB)

Coach: Mark Fox

PS/G: 63.1 (338th of 358)

PA/G: 66.1 (81st of 358)

SRS: 3.96 (115th of 358)

SOS: 6.96 (59th of 358)

ORtg: 96.4 (309th of 358)

DRtg: 101.0 (193rd of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +35000
